summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing for Batch A features. All 6 major feature groups tested successfully with 96.1% pass rate (49/51 tests). Core functionality verified: Classes capacity+student_count, Weekly/Academic Holidays CRUD, Public holidays endpoint (NO AUTH), Backup/Restore (export/import/logs), Student Mutation (masuk/keluar with auto is_active), Teacher Tasks CRUD, Piket schedules/fill-journal with task auto-completion, Admin jurnal enriched with filled_by_name. Regression tests confirm existing endpoints remain functional.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 401 instead of 403 when inactive user tries to access
minor_issues.impact: Authentication check happens before authorization, so deactivated users get 401 instead of 403
minor_issues.note: This is actually correct behavior - auth validation (401) should happen before permission check (403). Not a bug.

test_design_issues.issue: Test tried to create 'minggu' which already exists in seeded data
test_design_issues.impact: Test failed with 400 (duplicate prevention working correctly)
test_design_issues.note: Not a backend bug - duplicate prevention is working as expected. Test should use a unique day or clean up before testing.

passed_tests: Authentication: All 6 user logins (admin, guru1, walas7a, piket1, siswa1, tendik1)
Classes API: GET returns student_count + capacity + enriched fields (homeroom_teacher_name, room_name)
Classes API: POST/PUT with capacity field (default 40)
Weekly Holidays: GET (all roles), POST/PUT/DELETE (admin only, 403 for non-admin)
Weekly Holidays: Duplicate day prevention (400 conflict)
Academic Holidays: GET with year filter (year=2026)
Academic Holidays: POST/PUT/DELETE (admin only, 403 for non-admin)
Academic Holidays: Missing required fields validation (400)
Public Holidays Today: GET /api/public/holidays/today (NO AUTH, returns date/day/is_weekly_holiday/is_academic_holiday)
Backup Info: GET /api/admin/backup/info (admin only, returns collections count + total_documents)
Backup Export: GET /api/admin/backup/export (download .json with all collections)
Backup Import: POST mode=merge (upsert by id, preserve other data)
Backup Import: Invalid JSON validation (400)
Backup Logs: GET /api/admin/backup/logs (history)
Student Mutation: PUT mutation_type=masuk (sets is_active=true)
Student Mutation: PUT mutation_type=keluar (sets is_active=false)
Student Mutation: PUT mutation_type=null (clears mutation fields)
Student Mutation: Invalid mutation_type validation (400)
Teacher Tasks: GET (teacher sees own, admin/piket see all)
Teacher Tasks: POST (guru pengampu can create, non-owner gets 403)
Teacher Tasks: POST missing fields validation (400)
Teacher Tasks: PUT by owner (OK), by non-owner (403)
Teacher Tasks: DELETE pending (OK), completed (400)
Piket Schedules: GET /api/piket/schedules/today (admin/guru_piket only, 403 for pure guru)
Piket Schedules: Returns enriched data (has_journal flag, task info)
Piket Fill Journal: POST creates journal with fill_mode=piket, filled_by_user_id, task_id linked
Piket Fill Journal: Task status auto-updated to 'completed'
Piket Fill Journal: Duplicate fill prevention (400)
Admin Jurnal: GET /api/admin/jurnal returns filled_by_name enriched for piket-filled journals
Regression: GET /api/auth/me, /api/schedules, /api/admin/stats all working

2_weekly_holidays.note: 1 test failed due to test design (tried to create existing 'minggu')

features: Returns: date, day, is_weekly_holiday, is_academic_holiday, weekly_holiday, academic_holiday
GET /api/admin/backup/info (admin only, returns collections count + total_documents + last_backup)
GET /api/admin/backup/export (download .json, Content-Disposition attachment, includes all BACKUP_COLLECTIONS)
POST /api/admin/backup/import mode=merge (upsert by id, preserve other data)
POST /api/admin/backup/import mode=replace (delete all then insert - tested on safe collection)
GET /api/teacher-tasks (teacher sees own, admin/piket see all)
PUT /api/teacher-tasks/{tid} (owner or admin can edit, non-owner → 403)
7_teacher_tasks.note: 1 test failed: siswa POST returned 401 instead of 403 (user was deactivated in mutation test)

features: Returns schedules with has_journal flag + task info
POST /api/piket/fill-journal (creates journal with fill_mode=piket, filled_by_user_id, task_id)
Task status auto-updated to 'completed' after piket fill
Duplicate fill prevention (400 if journal already exists for today)
